center.name: George Ernest Shelley
center.summary: George Ernest Shelley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Somali courser、Sandy scops owl、Lilian's lovebird等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-browed mountain greenbul (Arizelocichla fusciceps), formerly the black-browed greenbul, is a species of the bulbul family of passerine birds. It is found in south-eastern Africa from south-western Tanzania to north-eastern Zambia, Malawi and west-central Mozambique

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bronze sunbird (Nectarinia kilimensis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is native to the Bié Plateau (Angola) and eastern Afromontane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: {{Speciesbox | image = Agapornis lilianae (Zambia).jpg | status = NT | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | genus = Agapornis | species = lilianae | authority = Shelley, 1894 | range_map = Lillians_lovebird_distribution.gif | range_map_caption = Range in red

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The orange-tufted sunbird (Cinnyris bouvieri) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: kismayensis (top) | image2 = Laniarius ruficeps - Adrien Jailloux - 607781219.jpeg | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Laniarius | species = ruficeps | authority = (Shelley, 1885) | synonyms = Dryoscopus ruficeps Shelley, 1885 }} The red-naped bushshrike or red-naped boubou (Laniarius ruficeps) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae, which is native to the dry lowlands of the eastern Afrotropics

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | image2 = Otus icterorhynchus - bureaubenjamin - 350477972.jpeg | taxon = Otus icterorhynchus | authority = (Shelley, 1873) | synonyms = }} The sandy scops owl (Otus icterorhynchus), or cinnamon scops owl, is an owl from the family Strigidae found in Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|A detail of an illustration by Henrik Grönvold, showing a male Shelley's sparrow Shelley's sparrow (Passer shelleyi), also known as Shelley's rufous sparrow or the White Nile rufous sparrow, is a sparrow found in eastern Africa from South Sudan, southern Ethiopia, and north-western Somalia to northern Uganda and north-western Kenya. Formerly, it was considered as a subspecies of the Kenya sparrow. This species is named after English geologist and ornithologist George Ernest Shelley

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Somali courser (Cursorius somalensis) is a wader in the pratincole and courser family Glareolidae, native to eastern Africa in Eritrea, eastern Ethiopia, Somalia, extreme southeast South Sudan, and northern and eastern Kenya

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lesser seedcracker or Nyasa seedcracker (Pyrenestes minor) is a fairly common species of estrildid finch found in eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Blanford's lark or Blanford's short-toed lark (Calandrella blanfordi) is a small passerine bird of the lark family, Alaudidae, which is native to north-eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-headed bluebill (Spermophaga ruficapilla) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown twinspot (Clytospiza monteiri) is a common species of estrildid finch found in sub-Saharan Africa
